title: Random Name Generator
description: Generates random names for entities as you name them!
body:
⚠️ IMPORTANT: USAGE GUIDELINES
If you're planning to use this on a server or modpack,
please refer to:
https://gamedash43.github.io/dash-mcl-licenses/#usage

![Title Text "Random Names"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebd14711125f62fc7015cd45443a888a1cb6fa41.png)

This add-on automatically generates a unique, three-part random name for any mob you name using specific keywords.

## 📜 How to Use
- **Step 1:** Name any mob with a nametag using one of the recognized keywords. (i.e. `randomname`)
- **Step 2:** The addon replaces the tag with a randomly generated name.
- **Details:** Names are built from three random parts, offering 50³ (125,000) unique combinations.

## ❓ FAQ

<details>
<summary>Which keywords trigger random name generation?</summary>
  
The following keywords (and their variations) will trigger the random name generation:
- `randomname`
- `RANDOMNAME`
- `Randomname`
- `randomName`
- `RandomName`
- `nameroll`
- `NAMEROLL`
- `Nameroll`
- `nameRoll`
- `NameRoll`
- `namepick`
- `NAMEPICK`
- `Namepick`
- `namePick`
- `NamePick`
- `nameblend`
- `NAMEBLEND`
- `Nameblend`
- `nameBlend`
- `NameBlend`
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>How unique are the generated names?</summary>
Names are generated in three parts, resulting in 50³ (125,000) possible unique combinations.
</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>How does this add-on impact performance?</summary>
There are no ticking functions, so only slight spikes occur whenever players name entities.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How do I report a bug?</summary>
Join the Discord and either DM me or post a message in the reports channel.
</details>
